# Mekka Hijama (مكة حجامة)

> Certified hijama (wet cupping), physiotherapy, and Chinese therapy clinic in the Sultanate of Oman, with 12 branches. All bookings are made via WhatsApp.

Mekka Hijama is a healthcare clinic specializing in prophetic hijama (cupping therapy), physiotherapy (physical therapy), and Chinese therapy. It operates 12 branches across Oman and serves patients in Arabic, English, and Urdu.

## Services

- Hijama / Wet Cupping Therapy (الحجامة النبوية) — prophetic cupping for blood detox, pain relief, improved circulation, immunity, and stress relief.
- Physiotherapy (العلاج الطبيعي) — physical therapy for musculoskeletal pain and rehabilitation.
- Chinese Therapy (العلاج الصيني) — traditional Chinese medicine treatments.

## Locations (12 branches in Oman)

Al Khoudh, Al Nasab, Al Amerat, Al Maabela (Muscat area); Barka; Sohar; Al Suwaiq; Ibri; Samail; Salalah; Sinaw; Adam.

Head office region: Muscat, Sultanate of Oman.

## Booking & Contact

- Primary booking: WhatsApp — https://wa.me/96899351374
- Phone: +968 9935 1374
- Hours: Saturday–Thursday, 8:00 AM – 10:00 PM
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/makkah_cupping

## Languages & URLs

- Arabic (default): https://hijamamekka.com/
- English: https://hijamamekka.com/en
- Urdu: https://hijamamekka.com/ur
